articles.title: Heavy to extremely heavy rainfall and heatwave warning issued for several states, list released | To view the entire bulletin issued by IMD | Inshorts - Inshorts
articles.full_text:
Heavy to extremely heavy rainfall and heatwave warning issued for several states, list released
IMD has issued heavy to extremely heavy rainfall warning over parts of Kerala, Karnataka, Puducherry, Arunachal Pradesh, Assam, Meghalaya, WB, Sikkim, Goa, Lakshadweep, Maharashtra, Nagaland, Manipur, Mizoram, Tripura, TN and Telangana for Tuesday. Heatwave is likely over parts of Haryana, Chandigarh, Delhi, Himachal Pradesh, J&K, Ladakh, Punjab, Uttar Pradesh, Maharashtra and Rajasthan.
